title: ourisia pygmaea
intro: Ourisia pygmaea, also known as native forget-me-not, is a small, flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues. Ourisia pygmaea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
